title: GetSwapsResponse
description: GetSwapsResponse schema from Uniswap Trading API

txHash.description: On-chain transaction hash. Present for transaction queries and for userOperation queries once the userOp has been included on-chain.

userOpHash.description: ERC-4337 userOperation hash. Present only when the row corresponds to a userOperation query.

hashType.description: Identifies whether the row was resolved from a transaction hash or a userOperation hash. Omitted on transaction rows; absence is equivalent to `TX`.
